note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiffpetitioner.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

defendantrespondent.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

the_maine_district_court_is_located_at.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

service_in_hand_or_by_mail_you_must_file.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

service_by_certified_mail_with_restricte.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

service_by_sheriff_the_sheriff_will_comp.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

undefined.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.
